message:
fix(tests): send capability IDs instead of operation IDs in handshake

Extract capability_for_operation() helper in gmail, openai, telegram,
and twitter integration tests. The handshake protocol expects capability
IDs (e.g. "gmail.send") in capabilities_requested, but tests were
sending operation IDs (e.g. "gmail.send_message"). The helper maps
operation names to their governing capability, and setup_handshake()
now passes the mapped capability IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
